markdownRemark.excerpt: As-salāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh, This is a follow-up update to the previous message. ʿīd is tomorrow Monday, July 28th, 2014, in-shāʾ-Allāh.
markdownRemark.html:
As-salāmu ʿalaykum wa raḥmatullāhi wa barakātuh,

This is a follow-up update to the previous message.

ʿīd is tomorrow Monday, July 28th, 2014, in-shāʾ-Allāh.

frontmatter.title: NEW CLASS: Explanation of the Aḥadīth from the Chapter of Purification of Bulūġ al-Marām
